candidates.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
candidates.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

candidates.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
candidates.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."
